label: session-ready
context: Streaming Demo session open with Anthropic and OpenAI voices ready
narration: Here's a session called Streaming Demo, with an Anthropic voice and an OpenAI voice ready to go.

label: session-started
context: Streaming Demo session open with Anthropic and OpenAI voices

label: round1-sent
context: Question sent — both voices begin streaming simultaneously
narration: As soon as the question is sent, both voices start streaming their responses at the same time. There's no waiting for one to finish before the other begins — Polyphon runs them in parallel, so you see each model's thinking unfold side by side in real time.

label: round1-complete
context: Both voices finished streaming round 1 responses

label: round2-sent
context: Follow-up sent — voices read each other's responses
narration: Now a follow-up goes out. Notice that each voice has access to what the other one said in round one. This means every response is informed by the full conversation — not just the user's prompt.

label: round2-complete
context: Both voices finished their round 2 responses
narration: Both voices have finished. Two perspectives, one conversation.
